context.game: Pico Echo - virtual pet cockatiel simulation
context.role: Displays Echo's needs (hunger) with icon inside bubble
context.usage_scenario: Appears when Echo is hungry, shows seed icon inside bubble to indicate need

visual_specification.shape: Rounded rectangle speech bubble with small tail pointing to Echo

animation.description: Static bubble with seed icon inside, no animation (appears/disappears based on state)

visual_specification.details: Cream bubble (#FFF1E8) 12x10px with 1px black outline (#1D2B53), small triangular tail 2px pointing toward Echo's head, contains 3x3px seed icon (#FFA300) centered inside bubble

relationships.shared_with: Could be reused for other status indicators with different icons
relationships.differences_from: All particle effects (static display vs animated particles)

explicit_negations: No permanent display (only during hungry state)
